sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data_sources (id INT PRIMARY KEY, source_name VARCHAR(255), source_type VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data_sources VALUES (2, 'Remote SQL Server', 'Remote');
SELECT source_name, aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS data_source FROM test_data_sources WHERE datatype(aref(sql_data_sources(), 0)) = 'VARCHAR';
SELECT source_type, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 1) AS type FROM test_data_sources) AS subquery GROUP BY source_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT source_name FROM test_data_sources WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data_sources WHERE source_type IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY source_name DESC;

SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS data_source, datatype(aref(sql_data_sources(), 0)) AS data_type FROM test_data_sources WHERE source_name = 'Local Virtuoso' AND datatype(aref(sql_data_sources(), 0)) != 'VARCHAR';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, source_name FROM test_data_sources WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(source_name) BETWEEN 1 AND 255;
SELECT id, source_name, aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS data_source FROM temp_data WHERE source_name LIKE 'R%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data_sources WHERE source_type IS NULL OR source_name IS NULL;
